title: codeowners-git Configuration
description: Configuration schema for codeowners-git CLI tool

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IntelliSense support

branchPrefix.description: Prefix to prepend to branch names. Supports template expressions like ${username}/${owner.split('/').pop()}/

messagePrefix.description: Prefix to prepend to commit messages. Supports template expressions like [${owner.toUpperCase()}]

defaultOwner.description: Default code owner to use when files have no CODEOWNERS entry

remote.description: Git remote name to push to

push.description: Push branches to remote after committing

verify.description: Run pre-commit hooks. Set to false to skip hooks (equivalent to --no-verify)

include.description: Comma-separated patterns to include specific code owners (micromatch syntax)

ignore.description: Comma-separated patterns to exclude specific code owners (micromatch syntax)

upstream.description: Upstream branch name pattern. Defaults to local branch name

force.description: Force push to remote (use with caution)

keepBranchOnFailure.description: Keep created branches even if the operation fails

append.description: Add commits to existing branches instead of creating new ones

pr.description: Create a pull request after pushing (requires push: true)

draftPr.description: Create a draft pull request after pushing (requires push: true)
